name: SDCardManager
description: FreeInk SD card manager: device-agnostic singleton with app-friendly read/write helpers and an optional board power hook (for PMIC-gated SD rails). Two backends behind one FsVolume seam — SdFat-over-SPI (default) and native 4-bit SDMMC via an esp-idf block device (FREEINK_SD_SDMMC).
